G1.name: Full Happy Path — All Gates Pass

G4.name: Pre-Send Gate Blocks — Third-Layer Safety Rejection

G5.name: Upgrade Override — Score Improvement Bypasses Cooldown

G6.name: Full Mixed Pipeline — All Outcomes Stress Test

key_findings: Full three-layer pipeline verification complete. 26 signals across 6 scenarios. Final distribution: send_candidate=14 (53.8%), blocked_by_value=4 (15.4%), suppressed_by_cooldown=3 (11.5%), blocked_by_pre_send=5 (19.2%), observe=2 (7.7%).

Cooldown gate successfully suppressed 3 signal(s) that passed the value gate — preventing same-asset spam in the send pipeline. This is the key v1.11-G validation: cooldown works correctly as the second layer between value gate and pre_send.

Upgrade override triggered 2 time(s) — assets with significantly improved value scores bypass cooldown. This prevents the cooldown gate from becoming a hard silence: important escalations still get through.

Pre-send gate caught 5 signal(s) that passed both value and cooldown checks — demonstrating the value of the third safety layer. Block reasons include source trust, TTL expiry, and payload validation failures.
Observe layer correctly captured 2 signal(s) — signals with price movement but insufficient confirmation factors. These would enter an observation pool rather than the send channel.

Pipeline layer separation confirmed: value gate, cooldown gate, and pre_send gate operate independently with clear pass/fail boundaries. Signals terminate at the first failing layer — no skip-around possible.

Compared to v1.11-F (which only tested value+cooldown, 18 signals): v1.11-G adds pre_send_gate as the third layer. The additional signals with pre_send blocking scenarios validate that the safety layer correctly rejects signals that would otherwise slip through a two-layer pipeline.

conditions_met: Cooldown gate correctly suppresses same-asset repeats — prevents spam in the send channel.
Pre-send gate correctly catches unsafe signals (source trust, TTL, payload validation) that pass value+cooldown.
Pipeline successfully identifies send_candidate signals — signals that pass all three gates are valid for test-channel delivery.
Observe layer is active and captures low-confidence signals for monitoring without sending.
blockers: This is a dry-run only. No signals were actually delivered to TG. Real delivery requires: (a) card router/renderer integration, (b) actual TG send function, (c) production config.
recommendations: Next step (v1.11-H): After verifying no expectation mismatches, run a test-channel live dry-run where: (a) signals that pass all three gates have mock cards rendered, (b) the rendered card is logged but NOT sent, (c) the full pipeline is validated end-to-end with real payload rendering.
Do NOT un-freeze the formal channel. The pipeline has not yet been validated with real TG delivery. Continue test-channel-only validation.
Consider adding a pipeline_dashboard that visualizes the three-layer flow: signals entering → value gate rejection → cooldown suppression → pre-send blocks → final send candidates.

scenarios.scenario_name: Full Happy Path — All Gates Pass
scenarios.objective: Verify that well-confirmed signals (price + OI + volume) from trusted sources with no asset repeats pass all three gates and become final_send_candidate.

price_move + strong confirmation(s): oi_confirmation, volume_confirmation, multi_asset_sync (backed)

scenarios.scenario_name: Pre-Send Gate Blocks — Third-Layer Safety Rejection
scenarios.objective: Verify that pre_send_gate correctly blocks signals that pass value and cooldown checks but fail safety rules: (a) source_type='unknown' → trust gate block, (b) stale timestamp → TTL gate block, (c) empty payload text → payload validation block.

pre_send_block_reasons: AVAX: source_type 'unknown' not allowed for test send
LTC: TTL expired: signal_type='market_anomaly' TTL=900s, age=7200s
NEAR: Payload text is empty or whitespace-only

scenarios.scenario_name: Upgrade Override — Score Improvement Bypasses Cooldown
scenarios.objective: Verify that when the same asset reappears within the cooldown window with a much higher value_score (Δ >= 15), the cooldown gate issues an upgrade_override, and the signal passes through to pre_send_gate.

value_warnings: volume field missing — volume confirmation not available
funding field missing — funding extreme not available
missing volume: -10 score penalty
signal_entries.cooldown_reason: First occurrence of ETH — no cooldown applied
signal_entries.trigger_reason: ETH 跌幅 5.50% — 中等信号: 价格+OI (score~55)

value_reasons: price_move + strong confirmation(s): oi_confirmation, volume_confirmation, funding_extreme
signal_entries.cooldown_reason: Upgrade override for ETH: value_score improved from 45 → 115 (Δ+70 >= 15) within cooldown window — allow as upgrade
signal_entries.trigger_reason: ETH 跌幅 8.50% — 强信号: OI+volume+funding 全确认 (score~100)
